def process_value(value, mode: str):
    if isinstance(value, int):
        if mode == "fast":
            return value * 2
        elif mode == "slow":
            return value * 3
        elif mode == "verbose":
            print(f"Processing int: {value}")
            return value * 4
    elif isinstance(value, str):
        if mode == "fast":
            return value.upper()
        elif mode == "slow":
            return value.lower()
        elif mode == "verbose":
            print(f"Processing str: {value}")
            return value.title()
    elif isinstance(value, list):
        if mode == "fast":
            return len(value)
        elif mode == "slow":
            return sum(value)
        elif mode == "verbose":
            print(f"Processing list: {value}")
            return sorted(value)
    return value

def transform_data(data, transform_type: str, mode: str):
    if isinstance(data, dict):
        if transform_type == "normalize":
            if mode == "batch":
                return {k: v / max(data.values()) for k, v in data.items()}
            elif mode == "stream":
                return {k: v / max(data.values()) for k, v in data.items()}
    elif isinstance(data, list):
        if transform_type == "normalize":
            if mode == "batch":
                return [x / max(data) for x in data]
            elif mode == "stream":
                return [x / max(data) for x in data]
    return data
